artifacts_excluded_reason: Generated output artifacts are excluded from the public seed dataset by default.
logs_excluded_reason: Raw runner logs are excluded from the public seed dataset.

# Agent Apprenticeship Workflow Task

Attempt: baseline

You are the worker/reviser agent for an agent apprenticeship data-generation run.
Produce high-quality work artifacts for the task and preserve useful execution evidence while you work.
Write agent_trace.json as a structured workflow trace following the AgentTrace schema.
Each step should represent one meaningful action: reading context, using a tool, creating or editing an artifact, validating output, handling an error, or delivering the

Add an explicit economic allocation section in qc_report.md that uses decision_budget_usd (227500) to compute expected-value-per-cost or, if costs are unknown, present clearly labeled cost-temporary stand-in variables and an allocation table showing how the decision_budget_usd would be apportioned across records. Also include a short reconciliation showing that the economic_rankings shown are consistent with the budget-aware allocation.

Create [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] that documents packet-only formulas (or script-ready pseudocode) used to compute error and sensitivity effects, provides record-level citations to packet rows, separates safety/compliance blockers from economic recommendations, and lists per-record recommendation in {hold, release, retest, mitigation}.

Create [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] with a header and machine-parseable rows including: record_id, observed_value, predicted_value, error, sensitivity_minus_effect, sensitivity_plus_effect, technical_rank, economic_rank, flags, recommendation, notes.

Create the required artifacts under [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] solvation_outlier_diagnosis.csv and qc_report.md. The CSV must be machine-parseable and include record-level fields (record_id, observed_value, predicted_value, error, sensitivity_shift_effect, recommendation, technical_rank, economic_rank, flags, notes).

Ensure qc_report.md contains packet-only, script-ready formulas or pseudocode for calculations, record-level citations tying each diagnosis to source packet rows, a sensitivity analysis using the provided sensitivity_shift_pct (apply +/-shift and report effect), and an explicit separation of safety/compliance blockers vs economic optimization recommendations. Include decision_budget_usd usage or labeled cost temporary stand-ins where cost/ROI is relevant.

Generate a complete agent_trace.json following the AgentTrace schema. Include steps for: reading ./input/task.json and ./input/task_brief.md, computing diagnoses, writing [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] writing [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] running the sensitivity check, writing actual_outputs.json, and running the deterministic precheck. Each step must include the canonical fields and artifact_refs.
Missing explicit use of decision_budget_usd in economic allocation (no allocation table or labeled cost temporary stand-ins tied to budget); minor omission in the economic-ranking deliverable.

Open the full qc_report.md (artifact attempts/revised/[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]) to confirm whether decision_budget_usd is actually unused or if budget-allocation content was truncated from the preview; if budget allocation exists, re-evaluate partial-credit justification.

Produce the required artifacts exactly as specified: write a valid ./agent_trace.json and the two required deliverables under ./artifacts/ (solvation_outlier_diagnosis.csv and qc_report.md). Ensure qc_report.md contains packet-only, script-ready formulas, record-level citations, sensitivity analysis (using sensitivity_shift_pct), and explicit decision_budget_usd usage or labeled cost temporary stand-ins.
